title: hildegardia erythrosiphon subsp. dolichocalyx
intro: Hildegardia erythrosiphon subsp. dolichocalyx is a plant species of the family Malvaceae, commonly found in tropical regions, and is also known as the 'red staminate Hildegardia'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hildegardia erythrosiphon subsp. dolichocalyx include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
